title: Currently, the best sites for uploading files are: <https://www.google.com/url?q=https://pillows.su/&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1779491638614991&usg=AOvVaw3oGLBOltt5DH7iTllauqi1> Pillowcase, <https://www.google.com/url?q=https://fileditch.com/&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1779491638615021&usg=AOvVaw1zjvGH_PX09l9m4xU81N_o> Fileditch & <https://www.google.com/url?q=https://imgbb.com/&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1779491638615040&usg=AOvVaw0sUEVVhG8A7GtCb8QV-xEm> ImgBB.
era: Remember to use the right formatting. If you feel like something is missing or you did something wrong, copy something a previous submission has already done and use that as the guideline or just ask someone.

title: <https://www.google.com/url?q=https://cobalt.tools/&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1779491638615232&usg=AOvVaw0FMUbCZwbFKprYZLu7MrJq> cobalt.tools is great for downloading any type of video & audio from YouTube, TikTok, Vimeo etc. Make sure to go to the cobalt settings and change "audio bitrate" to be 320kbps and "prefer better quality" on.
era: Make sure you use alternating colors and check often that they are not broken. If it is broken, select it then go on the paint bucket and click "Reset".

title: When linking to sources like web interviews, highlight over the relevant text with your mouse and then right click "Copy link to highlight". Doing so jumps straight to the part you highlighted and makes it stand out, which helps a ton.
era: No fan remakes, no unofficial mixtapes, nothing that's commercially available, always upload to a site that can be streamed off of.

title: For sources with YouTube videos, go to the timestamp you need and right click "Copy Video URL at current time" instead of just copying the video. Use if it's stuff that needs it (e.g. long interviews).
era: No released remixes, no matter how obscure, should be on this page. Those should be in Misc / Released.
